name: Saudi Aramco — Engineering Approval Chain
standard: Saudi Aramco Engineering Standards (SAES) + 9COM + Inspection Procedures
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that check tender packs and project documents against the Saudi Aramco engineering approval workflow: SAES citations, 9COM Schedule Q, Material Inspection Reports (MIRs), and Proponent / PMT / Inspection sign-off chain.
